# Geopatial Parquet Fixtures from [parquet-testing](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing)

This directory contains all the geospatial parquet test fixtures from the [parquet-testing repository](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing/tree/master/data/geospatial). It is duplicated here
to use for testing. These files are intended to call out specific edge cases related to null values, crs projections, and variations in the geometry type.


<!-- BEGIN GENERATED FIXTURE LINKS -->
<!-- This section is autogenerated. Do not edit manually. -->

## Source of Parquet Fixtures

- [crs-arbitrary-value.parquet](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing/blob/d1f14a06f800238b127b51fef6fa6b9feb15ab0b/data/geospatial/crs-arbitrary-value.parquet)
- [crs-default.parquet](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing/blob/d1f14a06f800238b127b51fef6fa6b9feb15ab0b/data/geospatial/crs-default.parquet)
- [crs-geography.parquet](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing/blob/d1f14a06f800238b127b51fef6fa6b9feb15ab0b/data/geospatial/crs-geography.parquet)
- [crs-projjson.parquet](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing/blob/d1f14a06f800238b127b51fef6fa6b9feb15ab0b/data/geospatial/crs-projjson.parquet)
- [crs-srid.parquet](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing/blob/d1f14a06f800238b127b51fef6fa6b9feb15ab0b/data/geospatial/crs-srid.parquet)
- [geospatial-with-nan.parquet](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing/blob/d1f14a06f800238b127b51fef6fa6b9feb15ab0b/data/geospatial/geospatial-with-nan.parquet)
- [geospatial.parquet](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing/blob/d1f14a06f800238b127b51fef6fa6b9feb15ab0b/data/geospatial/geospatial.parquet)
